arts.ttl: ‘I don’t talk about favourites’: Arne Slot refuses to get carried away by title talk
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach says City cannot be written off Leaders face bottom side Southampton on Sunday Arne Slot has said Liverpool will not get carried away with being tagged title favourites given the fine margins in the Premier League and Manchester City’s track record of reeling in rivals. Liverpool opened up a five-point lead over City before the international break and have made their best start to a Premier League season since winning the title in 2019-20. Opta now gives Liverpool a 60.3% chance of winning this season’s championship but Slot, whose side visit the bottom club, Southampton, on Sunday, insists recent history shows the reigning champions can never be written off. Arsenal held an eight-point lead over City on 1 April 2023. Liverpool were three points clear of City in April of this year. Pep Guardiola’s team won the title on both occasions. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle ready to swoop for winger courted by Liverpool and Arsenal
arts.sum: Newcastle United are considering a January bid for exciting Belgian winger Johan Bakayoko, according to reports. The Magpies have been on the lookout for reinforcements in wide positions for some time now, especially with Miguel Almiron likely to leave the club soon. arts.ttl: Arne Slot provides telling response to Liverpool’s new title expectations
arts.sum: The Reds visit Southampton on Sunday with statisticians Opta declaring there is a 58 per cent chance Slot’s side can go on to win the title

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot fires warning to players over Premier League title advantage
arts.sum: Liverpool face Southampton on Sunday as the Reds look to maintain their five-point lead at the top of the Premier League table but there's still a long way to go in the title race

arts.ttl: Injured Liverpool star ruled out of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Liverpool will be without first choice goal keeper Alisson for their UEFA Champions League clash with Real Madrid. The Reds return to Premier League action this weekend ahead of hosting Los Blancos on November 27 at Anfield in a repeat of the 2021 final. arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard gives exciting Curtis Jones prediction as Jurgen Klopp talks revealed
arts.sum: Curtis Jones has become a key player under new Liverpool boss Arne Slot and Reds icon Steven Gerrard has given a bold prediction on his place in the side in the future

arts.ttl: 33 years of Premier League history on Liverpool's side in title race
arts.sum: Premier League history is on Liverpool and Arne Slot's side as they plot to win the title this season.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola request denied as Premier League make major announcement impacting Liverpool
arts.sum: The schedule for the 2025/26 Premier League season has been confirmed and organisers have ignored a request from Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola for the start to be delayed

arts.ttl: Southampton boss Russell Martin reveals double defensive injury blow ahead of Liverpool test
arts.sum: Southampton head coach Russell Martin reveals that both Aaron Ramsdale and Jan Bednarek will be sidelined for "a number of weeks" due to injury.

arts.ttl: ‘Give him time’: Arne Slot tells Liverpool fans to be patient with winger tipped by John Barnes to explode
